_comment: Deterministic fixtures used when SEARCH_MODE=fixture. Keys are matched as case-insensitive substrings of the query/url.

Transformer architecture.title: Attention Is All You Need
Transformer architecture.snippet: Vaswani et al., 2017. The Transformer architecture replaces recurrence with self-attention.

Transformer architecture.title: Transformer (deep learning) - Wikipedia
Transformer architecture.snippet: Introduced by Vaswani et al. in 2017 at Google.

Model Context Protocol.title: Model Context Protocol
Model Context Protocol.snippet: MCP is an open protocol that standardises how applications provide context and tools to large language models.

Model Context Protocol.title: Anthropic announces MCP
Model Context Protocol.snippet: An open standard connecting AI assistants to data sources and tools.

BERT.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
BERT.summary: We introduce a new language representation model called BERT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers. BERT is designed to pre-train deep bidirectional representations from unlabeled text by jointly conditioning on both left and right context in all layers.

retrieval-augmented generation.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
retrieval-augmented generation.summary: We introduce RAG models which combine pre-trained parametric and non-parametric memory for language generation. Parametric memory is a pre-trained seq2seq model and non-parametric memory is a dense vector index of Wikipedia, accessed with a pre-trained neural retriever.
